layout.layout_rhythm: emerald-editorial: medium density, medium-high formality. A magazine-cover business deck: emerald + navy + paper, double-rule masthead ornaments, and a bold Bodoni-style display serif.
layout.spacing_rhythm: Reuse source spacing tokens and grid gaps: {"pad_default": "110px 110px 70px", "pad_cover": "56px 110px", "pad_closing": "80px 110px", "pad_statement": "110px 110px 70px", "masthead_inset": "56px 80px", "rule_thick": "4px", "rule_thicker": "5px", "rule_thin": "2p

template_json_typography.style: heavy Bodoni-style display serif paired with a wide geometric sans for chrome and body

design_tokens_typography.style: heavy Bodoni-style display serif paired with a wide geometric sans for chrome and body

typography.typography_role: heavy Bodoni-style display serif paired with a wide geometric sans for chrome and body

design_intent_font_pairing: LXGW WenKai or Noto Serif SC
LXGW WenKai TC is the version on Google Fonts
cjk_policy.known_degradation: The system's commitment to Bodoni Moda weight 900 at 460px (jumbo numerals on inverse navy panels) is the hardest to translate — there is no Chinese face on the Google Fonts CDN that delivers Bodoni 900's optical heaviness at that scale. Noto Serif SC at weight 900 is the closest, but the contrast profile of Han glyphs at 460px reads visually heavier than Bo

template_json_palette.description: vivid emerald green field, deep navy ink, and warm paper cream; high-saturation magazine-cover palette grounded by the navy

image.strategy: Preserve source image regions and screenshot-backed composition; runtime generation must use traceable online/approved image assets, not local decorative placeholders.

font_and_typography_constraints: italic is source-aware but CJK fake italic is forbidden; use color/weight fallback when unavailable
letter spacing is preserved for Latin labels and reset/softened for CJK

extraction_receipt.claim_boundary: visual contract only; not a renderer implementation or fidelity pass

display.mapping_reason: 保留 Bodoni Moda 的语义角色，但运行时优先使用 Slide/系统可用的 Source Sans Pro 与 思源黑体。

body.mapping_reason: 保留 LXGW WenKai TC 的语义角色，但运行时优先使用 Slide/系统可用的 Source Sans Pro 与 思源黑体。

label.mapping_reason: 保留 Bodoni Moda 的语义角色，但运行时优先使用 Slide/系统可用的 Source Sans Pro 与 思源黑体。

metric.mapping_reason: 保留 Bodoni Moda 的语义角色，但运行时优先使用 Slide/系统可用的 Source Sans Pro 与 思源黑体。

font_strategy.mapping_reason: 根据 design.md/template.html/template.json 中的 font-family 与 typography token 提取源字体；运行时按 Slide/系统/Adobe/思源可用字体降级。
font_strategy.same_role_font_justification: 源模板本身以单一 sans/system family 承担多数字体角色；通过 weight/size/line-height/uppercase 区分 display/body/label/metric。

italic.source_usage: source uses italic/font-style or italic-family tokens
italic.fallback_when_unavailable: use color_shift or weight_shift; do not fake CJK italic
italic.loss_notes: Satori/Slide may not provide exact Google italic face; record as visual approximation.

underline.source_usage: source uses underline/text-decoration or hairline emphasis
underline.mapped_decoration: native underline only for actual text-decoration source usage
underline.fallback_shape: 1px-3px rule or border accent when underline font rendering is unavailable

line_through.source_usage: not present in source; default no line-through

emphasis.color_shift: use source accent color roles only
emphasis.font_family_switch: only switch between mapped display/body/label/metric roles from this family
emphasis.weight_shift: increase one role step within font_weight_scale
emphasis.style_shift: italic only when source_usage requires and CJK fallback is safe
